# Lita Construction LLC

> Family-owned roofing, siding, and masonry contractor serving Northern and Central New Jersey since 2004. GAF certified and fully insured. Slogan: "Build Your Vision With Confidence."

## Key Facts

- **Business name:** Lita Construction LLC
- **Founded:** 2004 by Johnny Lita
- **Experience:** 25+ years
- **Phone:** (201) 540-7772
- **License:** NJ Home Improvement Contractor License #13VH11703800
- **Certifications:** GAF Certified, Fully Insured
- **Warranty:** 25-year warranty on labor and materials
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- **Free estimates:** Yes, no obligation
- **Ownership:** Family-owned and operated

## Services

- **Roofing** — Roof replacement, repair, new installation, GAF architectural shingles, flat/commercial roofing, skylights, storm-damage and leak repair, inspections.
- **Siding** — Vinyl and fiber-cement siding installation and repair, soffit/fascia/trim, seamless gutters, window and door installation, energy-efficient insulation.
- **Masonry** — Chimney repair and rebuilds, brick and stone work, paver patios and walkways, retaining walls and steps, foundation repair and waterproofing, concrete and hardscaping.

## Service Area

Northern and Central New Jersey, including:
Bergen County, Passaic County, Essex County, Hudson County, Morris County, Union County, Middlesex County, and Sussex County.
Representative cities served: Bergenfield, Paramus, Hackensack, Englewood, Fort Lee, Clifton, Paterson, Montclair, Newark, Jersey City, Wayne, Teaneck. Select projects in New York.

## How to Get a Quote

Call (201) 540-7772 or request a free estimate at https://litaconstructionllc.com/#quote. Lita Construction responds within one business day.

## Common Questions

- **Is Lita Construction licensed and insured?** Yes — fully insured and holds NJ License #13VH11703800; also GAF-certified.
- **Does Lita Construction offer free estimates?** Yes, free and no-obligation for roofing, siding, and masonry.
- **What warranty is offered?** A 25-year GAF manufacturer warranty covering labor and materials on qualifying roof installations.
- **What areas are served?** Northern and Central New Jersey (8 counties) plus select New York projects.
